description: An operator sees a cyberattack on a power grid control system occur simultaneously with drone attacks on substations.

nodes.task_description: Fuse the cyber alert from the network sensors with the physical alerts from radar tracking the drones.

expected_outcome.value: Operator correctly identifies that the cyber and physical attacks are part of a single, coordinated operation.

nodes.task_description: Assess the adversary's objective: to cause a widespread, prolonged power outage.

expected_outcome.value: Operator correctly determines the strategic intent behind the coordinated attack.

nodes.task_description: Prioritize the physical drone threats to prevent further damage while simultaneously tasking cyber defense teams to restore the grid control system.

expected_outcome.value: Operator makes a correct decision to address both threats concurrently.
